name: healthcare_cross_border_data_transfer_oakline_jus_mer
premise: Bed capacity, consent, and chart documentation are all under real-time scrutiny. A hospital incident command bridge convened after a critical infrastructure or patient-flow failure with competing clinical priorities. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: healthcare cross border data transfer oakline jus mer. The moral tension is explicitly framed as justice versus mercy: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Insurance and risk are insisting on a paper trail before any irreversible action; operations says delay costs measurable harm. The breach-notification and customer-communication clock has started; executive staff expect a single coherent position before the next press cycle. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident. Any exception must be time-boxed, named, and reversible where technically feasible.

agents.name: Amina Chandra
agents.identity: I am Amina Chandra, the accountable decision-maker on this Healthcare bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes mercy whenever someone invokes justice.

agents.name: Elena Haddad
agents.identity: I am Elena Haddad, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so mercy is not sacrificed by default just because justice feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect mercy.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to mercy to secure justice before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Amina Chandra must decide under justice versus mercy. What does Amina Chandra do?
